description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden stock and fore-end, both finished in a deep reddish-brown color. The receiver, barrel, and other metallic components are rendered in a matte silver or gray, giving the firearm a traditional yet robust appearance. The stock is fixed and ergonomically shaped for shoulder firing, while the barrel is long and slender, suitable for accurate shooting at distance. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights, with the front sight post and rear notch both visible. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly defined, and the magazine appears to be internal, as there is no visible detachable magazine. The overall construction suggests a reliable, utilitarian firearm commonly seen in hunting or civilian defense contexts.
description: A classic rifle with a reddish-brown wooden stock and fore-end, silver metallic barrel and receiver, and iron sights. The design is traditional, with a fixed stock and internal magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metallic receiver, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view down the barrel, emphasizing the circular muzzle and alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with the bolt and ejection port more visible.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the butt of the stock and the straight alignment of the barrel and sights.
